message:
feat(fcp-core,fcp-mesh,fwc): truth module, fork-resolution regression tests, placement evidence validation, and operator-truth bundle acceptance

Add the mesh-aware LiveTruthResolver module (`crates/fwc/src/truth.rs`, 3192 lines)
which classifies runtime knowledge into explicit KnowledgeStates — offline,
node-local, mesh-backed, degraded, or fallback-derived — and wraps every answer
with TruthFreshness and a DecisionTrace for audit-surface consumption.

Fork resolution regression scenarios (bead 24llg.5.3.2):
- connector_state.rs: lease-conflict deterministic winner, lease-tie explicit failure,
  CRDT merge resolution diagnostic, invalid-strategy diagnostic, resolution outcome
  JSON transcript validation
- planner.rs: zone-exclusion placement with evidence capture, all-nodes-excluded
  evidence, penalized-node evidence production, multi-node ranked candidate scores,
  evidence JSON shape validation; also migrates test_connector_id() helper across
  existing tests for consistency

CUAL integration test expansion:
- Add operator_truth_fixture_bundle_layer/bundle_suite contract assertions to the
  core evidence contract check
- Add full bundle-manifest acceptance test for refusal invoke scenarios
  (operator_truth_fixture_refusal_exports_replayable_bundle_manifest) proving
  the trace log, scenario context, truth context, and artifact manifest stay
  aligned with the fixture matrix
- Add helper functions: command_availability_from_tag, operator_truth_context,
  manifest_artifact_file_names, assert_bundle_manifest_matches_operator_truth_fixture

Fixture matrix and catalog updates:
- All fixture_matrix.json rows now carry bundle_layer + bundle_suite routing metadata
- catalog.json entry updated to document acceptance-bundle routing purpose
- fwc lib.rs/main.rs register the new truth and test_observability modules

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
